shas.notes: A_START_SHA == COMMON_SHA (no A-only setup commit). B_START_SHA == B_SETUP_SHA (the one B-only cache-prep commit is B's start point, and is excluded from B's implementation-run LOC per filesExcludedFromImplementationLoc below).

baseShaVerification.verificationMethod: gh issue view <n> --json state,closed for each; git merge-base --is-ancestor <prereq-merge-commit> BASE_SHA for 295/296/297 (287/289/291 are HITL doc-verification issues whose deliverable is docs/integrations/tiktok_api/contract-collection.md, present and populated at BASE_SHA)
baseShaVerification.layerZeroEvidence: docs/integrations/tiktok_api/contract-collection.md #14 (inventory update) and #17 (create product) carry verified cURL + response samples at BASE_SHA; #18 (edit product), #20-23 (promotion, still TBD), and #29-41 (fulfillment) carry stated paths per the same file.

testCommands.hiddenSuiteNote: Path/content defined only on experiment/301-evaluator. Apply out-of-band at grading time by copying the file into each treatment's final worktree -- never during the treatment's own session.

filesExcludedFromImplementationLoc: this experiment manifest, the benchmark plan, and the measurement manifest
hidden evaluator test file(s) authored on experiment/301-evaluator

A.unavailableReason: To be filled at run time from platform run metadata -- never estimated in advance.

B.cacheCondition: valid parent-cache-issue-278.json + grill-cache-issue-301.json injected before measurement
B.unavailableReason: To be filled at run time from platform run metadata -- never estimated in advance.

runFields.modelParityRequirement: A and B must use the identical model + modelSettings value once filled; a run with mismatched model/settings between A and B is invalid and must be discarded, not adjusted post hoc.

cacheSetupDuration.unavailableReason: No platform-level start/end timestamp was captured specifically bounding the B-only cache-prep window (writing + jsonschema-validating parent-cache-issue-278.json, grill-cache-issue-301.json, scope-alignment-issue-301.md). Per the no-estimation policy, this is recorded as null rather than approximated from conversation elapsed time.
cacheSetupDuration.scope: Bounded by the diff COMMON_SHA (28f219f) -> B_SETUP_SHA (8813d3a) -- short forms shown for readability, see shas block above for full hashes; contains only the three grill-cache artifacts, no #301 production code.

crossTreatmentAccessPolicy: Neither A nor B's session may read the other treatment's branch, worktree, transcript, or artifacts. Both branch names are fixed here for benchmark bookkeeping only -- this does not grant either run permission to inspect the sibling branch's contents.
nextSteps: Neither A nor B implementation has begun. Launch commands are recorded below for operator use; the operator (not either treatment's own session) is responsible for starting each run in its own isolated worktree/session and for applying the hidden evaluator suite out-of-band after each run completes.
